Do you need a vehicle for business?

Choose from the award-winning Volkswagen, ŠKODA, SEAT, and Volkswagen Commercial Vehicle range for either short-term daily rental (1-28 days) or long-term rental (28+ days). Plus, the vehicle you book, is the vehicle you get. Unless you are on your own company fleet insurance, the minimum age for business rental is 25 and you must have held your licence for a minimum of 12 months.

Complete the contact form and let us know your requirements. Then we can get you set up and on the road.

## **About Us**

If you’re looking for the perfect rental vehicle with no hidden extras, VWFS Rent-a-Car Slough is perfect for you. We’re more than just a car rental business, we offer an excellent customer experience, and we can guarantee that the vehicle you book is the vehicle you get. It’s no coincidence we're rated excellent on Trustpilot!

VWFS Rent-a-Car operates from Citygate Skoda in 367 - 371 Bath Road, Slough, SL1 5QA.

## **Car Hire Services**

Here's what we offer -

- Excellent mix of Škoda, SEAT and CUPRA vehicles
- Car hire rates include insurance ( [Collision Damage Waiver](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/car-hire/rental-car-insurance))
- Built-in Sat Nav systems, where available, for free
- Easy check-in and check-out process
- No hidden costs
- Flexible payments
- Optional Extras - Additional Driver, Travel Abroad, Enhanced Collision Damage Waiver

## **How to find us**

We know that postcodes are frequently inaccurate, but with what3words, you can find the precise location for our car park entrance. It is a free app that also allows users to get directions using the navigation apps on their phone such as Google Maps, Waze or ViewRanger.

**📍 [Find us using What3Words](https://what3words.com/lively.behind.moves)**

- [Citygate ŠKODA, 367 - 371 Bath Road, Slough, SL1 5QA, Slough, United Kingdom](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Citygate%20%C5%A0KODA%2C%20367%20-%20371%20Bath%20Road%2C%20Slough%2C%20SL1%205QA%2C%20Slough%2C%20United%20Kingdom)
- [01753 331083](tel:01753331083)
- [rentacar.slough@citygate.co.uk](mailto:rentacar.slough@citygate.co.uk)
- Monday to Friday: 9:00 to 17:00



Saturday: 9:00 to 12:00

### Do you need a vehicle for business?

We’ve got our fleet on standby for business purposes. No baffling
jargon or complicated clauses. The vehicle you book is the one you get.
These are all available for either short-term or long-term rental.

Click the button below to contact a Rental Manager directly.

[Let us know your requirements](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/locations/skoda-car-hire-slough/?ref=gmb/business-rental)

### Need some inspiration?

Can’t decide which vehicle? Have a browse below of some of our range, all ready to be booked immediately.

### [FABIA](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/vehicle-rental/vehicle-details/fabia-model)

[![FABIA](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/assets/uploads/images/vehicle-panel-images/_vehiclePanel/170540/fabia-removebg-preview.webp)](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/vehicle-rental/vehicle-details/fabia-model)

- Small
- 5 Seats
- Manual
- [2 Medium](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/locations/skoda-car-hire-slough/?ref=gmb#)
- Aircon

Great for a city run-around or a jaunt out to the countryside. Stylish and full of all the latest technology to make driving more enjoyable for you.

[View this FABIA](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/vehicle-rental/vehicle-details/fabia-model?model=FAB&locationId=415) [Book online now](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/vehicle-rental/vehicle-details/fabia-model?model=FAB&locationId=415)

### [SCALA](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/vehicle-rental/vehicle-details/scala-model)

[![SCALA](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/assets/uploads/images/vehicle-panel-images/_vehiclePanel/170996/Scala.webp)](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/vehicle-rental/vehicle-details/scala-model)

- Medium
- 5 Seats
- Manual
- [2-3 Medium](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/locations/skoda-car-hire-slough/?ref=gmb#)
- Aircon

The award winning Škoda SCALA encompasses a host of unique new features and intuitive technology. Sporty, generously spacious and versatile, it adapts to go wherever life takes you

[View this SCALA](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/vehicle-rental/vehicle-details/scala-model?model=SCAL&locationId=415) [Book online now](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/vehicle-rental/vehicle-details/scala-model?model=SCAL&locationId=415)

### [KAROQ](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/vehicle-rental/vehicle-details/karoq-model)

[![KAROQ](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/assets/uploads/images/vehicle-panel-images/_vehiclePanel/170774/Karoq_2023-02-14-121336_ldze.webp)](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/vehicle-rental/vehicle-details/karoq-model)

- Medium
- 5 Seats
- Manual
- [2-3 Medium](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/locations/skoda-car-hire-slough/?ref=gmb#)
- [SatNav](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/locations/skoda-car-hire-slough/?ref=gmb#)
- Aircon

Small SUV with Simply Clever features, like the hooks in the boot to keep your shopping in place, or the parking ticket holder on the windscreen. Elevated ride height to make you feel more visible on the road.

[View this KAROQ](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/vehicle-rental/vehicle-details/karoq-model?model=KAR&locationId=415) [Book online now](https://www.vwfsrentacar.co.uk/vehicle-rental/vehicle-details/karoq-model?model=KAR&locationId=415)
